recommendations.title: The Paperboy
recommendations.overview: A reporter returns to his Florida hometown to investigate a case involving a death row inmate.

recommendations.title: The United States vs. Billie Holiday
recommendations.overview: Billie Holiday spent much of her career being adored by fans. In the 1940s, the government targeted Holiday in a growing effort to racialize the war on drugs, ultimately aiming to stop her from singing her controversial ballad, "Strange Fruit."

recommendations.title: Precious: Based on the Novel 'Push' by Sapphire
recommendations.overview: In Harlem in 1987, Claireece "Precious" Jones is a 16-year-old African American girl born into a life no one would want. She's pregnant for the second time by her absent father, and at home she must wait hand and foot on her mother, an angry woman wh

recommendations.title: The Deliverance
recommendations.overview: Ebony Jackson, a struggling single mother fighting her personal demons, moves her family into a new home for a fresh start. But when strange occurrences inside the home raise the suspicions of Child Protective Services and threaten to tear the family

recommendations.title: Son of the South
recommendations.overview: In civil rights era Montgomery, Alabama, Klansman's grandson Bob Zellner must choose which side of history to be on during the Movement. Defying his family and white Southern norms, he fought against social injustice, repression and violence to chang

recommendations.title: Winter on Fire: Ukraine's Fight for Freedom
recommendations.overview: Over 93 days in Ukraine, what started as peaceful student demonstrations became a violent revolution and full-fledged civil rights movement.

recommendations.title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
recommendations.overview: Revered sushi chef Jiro Ono strives for perfection in his work, while his eldest son, Yoshikazu, has trouble living up to his father's legacy.

recommendations.title: The Help
recommendations.overview: Aibileen Clark is a middle-aged African-American maid who has spent her life raising white children and has recently lost her only son; Minny Jackson is an African-American maid who has often offended her employers despite her family's struggles with

recommendations.title: Ghosts of Mississippi
recommendations.overview: A Mississippi district attorney and the widow of Medgar Evers struggle to bring a white supremacist to justice for the 1963 murder of the civil rights leader.

recommendations.title: Embattled
recommendations.overview: The eldest son of a ruthlessly tough MMA champion must fight his way out of the abusive cycle his father has continued.
